/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,AI_XPlane_Bridge.xpl -o AI_XPlane_Bridge.xpl CMakeFiles/AI_XPlane_Bridge.dir/src/Plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_XPlane_Bridge.dir/src/AircraftManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_XPlane_Bridge.dir/src/UdpReceiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AI_XPlane_Bridge.dir/src/PlayerReader.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/mnt/e/X-Plane Plugins/AI_XPlane_Bridge/thirdparty/XPlaneSDK/Libraries/Linux" "/mnt/e/X-Plane Plugins/AI_XPlane_Bridge/thirdparty/XPlaneSDK/Libraries/Linux/XPLM_64.so" "/mnt/e/X-Plane Plugins/AI_XPlane_Bridge/thirdparty/XPlaneSDK/Libraries/Linux/XPWidgets_64.so" -lpthread -ldl
